title: Circuit's Adventure Pack
description: A simple immersion focused vanilla modpack for modern Minecraft
body:
![banner image](https://i.imgur.com/GMR2x5j.jpeg)

A simple immersion focused strictly vanilla modpack for modern minecraft.

Mainly intended for use on a specific friend's server but works for any modern vanilla Minecraft server.

Includes visual mods, such as Iris and Complementary Shaders, sound mods such as Presence Footsteps and Ambient Sounds 6, and also some optimization mods to improve the performance of the game!

![second](https://i.imgur.com/hWlR7Xy.jpeg)


### Credits:
Includes the Photo Mode mod (a port from the Better Than Adventure mod) from this github repo: [https://github.com/forkiesassds/PhotoMode](https://github.com/forkiesassds/PhotoMode)
